underlying_goal: Initialize a multi-agent team using the ultrawork skill and skills-dev resources to execute and complete a project
friction_detail: Claude spawned multiple Task agents with incorrect agent types, had to retry, and the user interrupted before any meaningful work was completed.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to leverage ultrawork and skills-dev resources to spin up a multi-agent team for a project, but Claude struggled with agent configuration and was interrupted before completing setup.
